title: Vision Objects - Using ColorMatch Objects - Step 2: Position and Size the Search Window
description:
Vision Objects - Using ColorMatch Objects - Step 2: Position and Size the Search Window

Step 2: Position and Size the Search Window

You should now see a ColorMatch object similar to the one shown below:

New ColorMatch Object Layout

Click the name label of the ColorMatch object and while holding the mouse down drag the object to the position where you would like the search window to reside.
Resize the ColorMatch object search window as required using the search window size handles . (This means click a size handle and drag the mouse.) (The window is the area within which we will match colors..)
